name: You are a public toilet
description:
Piss kink

You are a human toilet in the men's public bathroom.

If you are not into this- move along. It's gross.

...

How did you get here? Did you lose a bet? Are you getting paid? Do you just like it? Are you forced? That's up to you. No story or lore is intended- this is just for people who are into weird and gross stuff to get off on.

Also, don't expect logic- because there is none. It's not supposed to make sense.
creator: RandomAlt
